MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, Inc. is present. Represented by Kevin Barr.
Attorney David J. Briggs appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alice Armstrong is present.
Attorney Elaine K. Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
